chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.Nos.D- 3471 & 3303 of 2022 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- C.P.No.D-3471/2022 1.For order on office objection. 2.For hearing of CMA No.15388/2022 3.For hearing of main case. C.P.No.D-3303/2022 1.For order on office objection. 2.For hearing of CMA No.14698/2022 3.For hearing of main case. 20.03.2025 Mr.Hanif Faisal Kamal, Advocate holding brief for Mr.Khalid Jawed Khan, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Ali Murad, Advocate holding brief for Mr.M.Nouman Jamali, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr.Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Khalid Rajpar, Advocate for the Respondent. Mr.Nadir Hussain, Advocate holding brief for Mr.Irfan Mir Halepota, Advocate for Respondent. Per learned counsel for the petitioner provisional assessment has already been undertaken and finalization is pending due to this petition. He states that it may be just and proper for the finalization to be undertaken after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action shall be taken their against or security be encashed in the meantime. Learned counsel for the Respondent articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that this petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Office is directed to place copy of this order in connected petition. Judge Judge nasir
